metadata.description: Competitive intelligence toolkit — one competitor in, a feature-matrix + SWOT + strategy report out in ~2 min, via a 5-role AI pipeline. Bilingual (繁中/EN). For founders / PMs / marketing freelancers. 競品情報工具集，報告語言跟隨使用者。

plugins.name: competitor-sprint
plugins.description: Competitive Intelligence Sprint: a 5-role AI pipeline produces a feature-matrix + SWOT + strategy report in ~2 min. Optional hiring-signals, Markdown incremental fact-base, bilingual output (繁中/EN). 一鍵競品情報衝刺，報告語言跟隨使用者。
